scenarioName: Debate Coordinator Overrides on Mixed Signals
description: When bull and bear can both make a strong case (mixed signals, moderate confidence), the coordinator must default to Hold rather than picking a side it cannot defend with conviction.

input.userMessage: Market analysis for MSFT shows mixed signals with moderate confidence.

context.summary: Sideways price action with tight range; bullish RSI but bearish MACD crossover; flat volume.

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON with symbol, action, quantity, reasoning, confidence
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: Mixed signals + sub-0.7 confidence must yield Hold even after a vigorous debate.
